author: @chaorrottai
text:
Heat pumps don't make heat, but by concentrating latent heat they do make potential energy between thermal reservoirs. The ammount of potential energy they make is more than what was required to spin the compressor.

Heat isn't special. If you use an electrophorus device like a holtz machine or wimshurst machine, you can get the same effect by using latteral motion instead of direct motion relative to the eletric field and then you only have to work against a component vector of the electric force and the electrons at the outputs are propelled by the full electric force vector. Because work is F*d, this means that you can input a lower force over a minimal distance, and extract a larger force over that same distance. The input is sliding over of the XY plane, and the output is through a larger potential well on the Z axis.

COP > 1.

Free energy is all around us, but most sources have such low potential energy that it's not worth the trouble and cost of capturing it. I think it is interesting that aside from geothermal, all usable sources of free energy are derived from the sun, and only from the ultraviolet and infrared spectrum. 
I'm not even taking nuclear energy into consideration because I don't think we should use it, as overall we are so irresponsible that we're willing to force future generations to pay for our carelessness by leaving for them giant scattered piles of deadly waste. What a 💩🎁!

Saw that recently, someone tried to tell me it wasn't overunity and used all sorts of silly reasons, like tail wind pushing it... Tailwind doesn't impart energy if the craft is moving faster than it, lol. The miniature model that ran itself once the wheels got fast enough should have made it clear, yet somehow people don't catch on.

If the only thing keeping it running is the spin of its own wheels that outpaces its own initial exciter (the wind) without slowing down, and it continues to accelerate with no input, it's obvious what's going on there.

I've noticed over the years that many science minded folks have forgotten what it means to be scientific. 

They are not patient, unwilling to put time into anything, and are judgmental and making assumptions just as easily and frequently as nonbelievers. 

To assume the absence of evidence is evidence of absence jumping to conclusions.  But don't tell them that.  It's their comfort for handling the unknown, as if saying "I don't know" reveals an insecurity.

author: @davidl.howser9707

Robert an interesting read on real anti gravity research....found on wikipedia is information on...Ning Li (Chinese: 李宁, pinyin: Lǐ Níng; January 14, 1943 – July 27, 2021) was a Chinese American  scientist. Born in Shandong  she graduated from the Department of Physics of Peking University and in 1983 she emigrated with her family from China to the United States.She is known for her physics and anti-gravity research. In the 1990s, Li worked as a research scientist at the Center for Space Plasma and Aeronomic Research, University of Alabama in Huntsville. In 1999, she left the university to form a company, AC Gravity LLC, to continue anti-gravity research.

Also YouTube channel Sandboxx (Air Power) just released "The disappearance of America's leading anti-gravity researcher". Sandboxx did an excellent video on the Researcher Ning Li , and Her life's work focused on Anti-Gravity research. Also she wrote several research papers that were per reviewed on the topic of real anti gravity.

text: The fact that they're endless fake free energy machines online  has nothing to do with proving the actual existence of free energy. Assuming you're a natural conscious person you'll notice that free energy is evidenced in nature itself in many different ways. As long as you're not foolish enough to impose a black box on your machine and operate the way nature does you should be able to create free energy in other ways even besides windmills and solar proves you can. What does it say to you that hydrogen dirigibles pull tons of weight thousands of miles for months on end without any need for refueling? You've been tricked Not merely by the hucksters on the YouTube you've been most of all tricked by your understanding of energy by your so-called education authorities. The combination apparently is quite intractable. All they do is point out a case of limitation and theresfter  you can nolonger even see beyond this black box  to figure out that nature doesn't use a black box to achieve its perpetual energy. It gets to be really aggravating when you see how much mind control has inhibited Freethought And along with it any realization of free energy. Because then you have a society that unwittingly manifests this cultivated ignorance into endless cases of fake  free energy devices just like Robert here says.

author: @JenkoRun
text:
Most of the "Free Energy" videos out there are definitely fake without doubt, however one must still account for the fact that Electric and Magnetic fields do not cause each other, according to the Maxwell-Heaviside equations, otherwise his equations would be in error which I don't accept. 

Looking at the rotor and stator coils of generator with that in mind calls in some questions.

replies.author: @JenkoRun
replies.text:
@markbothum4338 That is technically correct since "Electric" and Magnetic fields are the same thing just in different modalities, like ice and water, however this doesn't account for the fact that those fields do not cause each other separately in Electromagnetism:

"According to these equations, in time-variable systems electric and magnetic fields are always created simultaneously, because they have a common causative source: the changing electric current [the last term of Eq. (1-4.1) and the last term in the integral of Eq. (1-4.2)]. Once created, the two fields coexist from then on without any effect upon each other. Therefore electromagnetic induction as a phenomenon in which one of the fields creates the other is an illusion. The illusion of the "mutual creation" arises from the facts that in time-dependent systems the two fields always appear prominently together, while their causative sources (the time-variable current in particular) remain in the background."

"a time-variable electric current creates an electric field parallel to that current [the last term of Eq. (1-4.1)]. This field exerts an electric force on the charges in nearby conductors thereby creating induced electric currents in them. Thus, the term “electromagnetic induction" is actually a misnomer, since no magnetic effect is involved in the phenomenon, and since the induced current is caused solely by the time-variable electric current and by the electric field produced by that current."

"There is a widespread belief that time-variable electric and magnetic fields can cause each other. The analysis of Maxwell’s equations presented above does not support this belief. It is true that whenever there exists a time-variable electric field, there also exists a time-variable magnetic field. This follows from Maxwell’s Eqs. (1-1.3) and (1-1.4) as well as from Eqs. (1-4.1) and (1-4.2). 

But, as we have seen, neither Maxwell’s equations nor their solutions indicate an existence of causal links (no causation) between electric and magnetic fields. Therefore we must conclude that an electromagnetic field is a dual entity always having an electric and a magnetic component simultaneously created by their common sources: time-variable electric charges and currents.° This conclusion must hold for all electromagnetic fields, including electric and magnetic fields in electromagnetic waves."

-Causality, Electromagnetic Induction, and Gravitation: A Different Approach to the Theory of Electromagnetic and Gravitational Fields by Oleg D. Jefimenko

What this means is that the magnetic fields of the rotor cannot be responsible for the arise of the Electric component in the stator because they arise together as a duel entity and not separately, neither 1 alone causes the other.

In order for his equations to remain true an explanation for the cause of Electromagnetic fields must exist that is outside the kinetic input, this makes it impossible for there to be any transduction occurring in the "Generator" which brings up some very important questions.

Something of this significance is very unlikely to have been either a mistake or not accounted for when Heaviside simplified Maxwell's equations, at the very least a casual link would have been alluded to somewhere. The only way around this is for the equations to be in error, and I cannot accept that.
